title: diplazium polycarpum
intro: Diplazium polycarpum, also known as Chinese fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Athyriaceae and is native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Diplazium polycarpum is said to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and treating digestive issues. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, where it is steeped in hot water to create a herbal tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
